name: HandleDirection
summary: Class with the definition of the handle directions.

enum_values.name: ANGLE
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction. Show a circle as info.

enum_values.name: CLICK
enum_values.summary: handle can be used as button, ...

enum_values.name: PLANE_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction on the defined plane from HandleProperties Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: POINT_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in point direction, defined by the reference and handle point. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: VECTOR_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in the direction defined by the vector from HandleProperties

enum_values.name: XYZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xyz direction.

enum_values.name: XY_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xy direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: XZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in xz direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: X_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in x-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in x-direction

enum_values.name: YZ_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in yz direction. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: Y_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in y-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in y-direction

enum_values.name: Z_COORD
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in point direction, defined by the reference and handle point. Draw an arrow symbol in reference-handle point-direction

enum_values.name: Z_DIR
enum_values.summary: Move the handle in z-direction. Draw an arrow symbol in z-direction

enum_values.name: angle
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

enum_values.name: plane_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use PLANE_DIR

enum_values.name: point_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use POINT_DIR

enum_values.name: vector_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use VECTOR_DIR

enum_values.name: x_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use X_DIR

enum_values.name: xy_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XY_DIR

enum_values.name: xyz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

enum_values.name: xz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XZ_DIR

enum_values.name: y_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use Y_DIR

enum_values.name: yz_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use YZ_DIR

enum_values.name: z_coord
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use XYZ_DIR

enum_values.name: z_dir
enum_values.summary: deprecated, use Z_DIR
